description: A split-system home air conditioner model depicting both the indoor and outdoor units mounted on opposite sides of a central dividing wall. The outdoor unit features a vertically oriented fan on its exterior face.
components: Indoor evaporator unit (sleek, horizontal rectangular chassis with bottom air louver)
Outdoor condenser unit (larger, rugged rectangular chassis mounted on brackets)
Outdoor fan assembly (circular grill, hub, and radial fan blades on the external face)
notes: Position the wall at Y=0 (extending from Y=-50 to Y=50). Place the indoor unit on the negative Y face (Y < -50) and the outdoor unit on the positive Y face (Y > 50). The fan must be modeled on the outer face of the outdoor unit (facing +Y) with a recessed circular cavity, a central hub, and at least 4 simplified fan blades.
